title: justicia marmorata
intro: Justicia marmorata, also known as 'Marmorata Balsam' or 'Balsam of Gauva', is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Justicia marmorata include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from sore throats and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Justicia marmorata typically involve making a decoction or infusion from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or it is also used to make balsams and ointments for topical application.
